title: Admin panel health check UI, webhook delivery log pagination
description: Added real-time health check status display to the admin panel. Webhook delivery logs now paginate correctly for high-volume endpoints.

title: Fixed onboarding redirect after email verification
description: Users who completed email verification were being redirected to the dashboard before finishing onboarding. Now correctly redirected to the onboarding flow.

title: Initial public release: auth, billing, admin, onboarding, API tokens, webhooks, 2FA
description: Launch of the application with core features including authentication, Stripe billing with double-charge prevention, admin panel, onboarding wizard, API token management, webhooks, and two-factor authentication.
